programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones
programme.desc: Young Indiana Jones

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Labyrinth of Death

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When the planets are in line with each other in this particular galaxy it creates a temporary portal out of this universe into a universe of opposites where the evil halves of personalities live Saw Boss tries to trick Jayce into it

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Herculoids
programme.desc: Herculoids

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Link and Zelda help the N team in building a mechanical dragon the purpose of which is to help them sneak in Dragons Den and put a stop to Dragonlords evil plan of hatching a deadly golden dragon

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A series of deaths from bad prosthetic devices are blamed on product tampering

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Professor believes the castaways may be beginning to suffer from Island Madness so he convinces Ginger to use her psychic powers to convince them that a boat is coming to rescue them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A crate containing a lion bound for a zoo washes up on the island But while the other castaways are scared for their lives the lion immediately makes a bond with Gilligan

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E20
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E20

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E17
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E17

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While Max and 99 host a writer who is doing a story on CONTROL for a national news magazine his assistant is a KAOS agent intent on making them look like fools

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A man who only wants quiet in the world invents a silent explosive

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When the seven lady truckers are kidnapped to drug kingpin Leonard Markers San Pepe compound BJ Fred and Hatsie Tipton and a very unlikely ally team up to rescue them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Cell 2455 Death Row
programme.desc: Whit condemned and awaiting execution reviews the events of his life that has brought him to Cell 2455 on San Quentins Death Row a story he had told in a autobiography that became a sensational best-seller As a boy the young Whit stole groceries to help feed his impoverished family later moving on into major crime to impress a young gang moll Jo-Anne and turns into a cold-blooded thug when he is repudiated by the girl he loves Doll And by his own lawyer when he is arrested and tried as the infamous Lovers Lane Bandit In cell 2455 he studies law to the point where he wins stay after stay twice within minutes of his scheduled execution

programme.title: The Disappearance Thriller
programme.desc: Thriller about a contract killer whose wife has disappeared When he is hired by an international organization to carry out a shy or hit he suspects they are connected with her disappearance

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is on holiday at the Winter Olympics where Dr Claw plans to sabotage the games by replacing the torch bearer Gadget also faces the MAD yodeler and a Yeti-like Snowbot

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Senators daughter is found to have kryss in her system Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production They believe Federov is involved Daan is addicted to kryss

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While waiting to leave a small town in Montana Dr Kimble is spotted by the authorities and arrested He is cleared for having stolen a truck but the sheriff decides to jail him for having resisted arrest and suspects hes not who he says he is While Kimble is held in jail another prisoner determines his true identity

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An Englishman with a large gambling debt agrees to smuggle whiskey onto an Indian reservation to pay off his losses Enroute he meets up with Victoria on the way to the reservation with medical supplies and they find the road there is full of unexpected surprises

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Paradise Springs the town of friendly people When hes greeted with fists instead and has to stand trial he finds the judges wife knows more than shes telling but he remembers her too but doesnt know why

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A young patient from a psychiatric home tells the police that an elderly patient at the facility was murdered After the young man is found dead himself Steve decides to feign mental illness to gain admittance to the place fearing that someone may be killing patients

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Stephan Puetz v. Rashid Yusupov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Ryan Connor HK43.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Mike Davis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Shayna Baszler

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Mohammed Jaraya v. Redouan Laarkoubi

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Derek Parker v. Lloyd Valley.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with more action packed MMA! We kick off this show with a great amateur fight between Dale Tallman and Chris Smeltzer. Following is the Main event of the evening, a professional Light Heavyweight Title Fight between UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace and TUF finalist Dan Spohn. You are in for five rounds of MMA action, so do not miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kingsley Crawford v. Festus Ahorlu

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sean McKinnon v. Rhys Jones

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mackenzie Senger v. Jeremy Edwards.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Dre Infinite Capri Compton Interview
programme.desc: From different worlds and 2 different culturals Meet the rap star and the opera star who got together an made a few hits
